plan_adherence_notes: All 12 plan steps were completed exactly as specified. Factory function with 3 positions (positive/negative/zero P&L), all 10 test cases match their plan descriptions (empty state, loading, error, metric cards, color tones, selected market detail, fallback message, positions table, row highlighting, empty positions), and vitest confirmed all 10 pass.
missed_questions: Should the updatedAt timestamp rendering be tested (component displays it but no test verifies it)?
What should render when data is undefined but isLoading=false and error=null (no explicit test for this state)?
reason: All 10 tests pass. Every plan step was executed faithfully. Test coverage spans the component's key states (empty accountId, loading, error, full data render) and behaviors (metric formatting, color tones, selected market detail card with fallback, positions table with row highlighting, empty positions). The two missed questions are minor: updatedAt rendering is trivial presentation and the undefined-data-no-error state is a transient React Query state unlikely to surface bugs. Research quality was high — all assumptions verified correctly, and the decision to use plain render() and real formatters was well-grounded in codebase analysis.
